posts_within_12h_detected.text: Didn’t need it but had a bad case of FOMO not having it 🤦🏻‍♂️ the addiction is real. Might start the first foil rehab clinic once summer ends. Integrated mast is 🔥🔥🔥

posts_seen_outside_window.summary: Foot straps on Tray 110 compatibility question; comments include where plastic inserts are.

latest_visible_post.summary: Survey post (seen as ~1 week old) with rider setup insights

failures: Facebook UI returned obfuscated timestamp strings in several places, limiting exact age verification.
Some feed/comment expansion controls dynamically moved the view to permalinks, preventing deterministic all-comments expansion across every visible post.

Could not conclusively enumerate every single comment/reply for posts older than scan window due dynamic lazy-load + anti-automation UI behavior; all such gaps are reported here instead of silently skipped.

product_intel: Integrated mast post shows positive hype and FOMO behavior from engaged riders.
Tray 110 footstrap compatibility remains a practical setup question in community discussion (outside 12h window).
